arts.ttl: John Stones blocking out Manchester City noise while on England duty: ‘I put a lot of trust in the club’
arts.sum: The build-up to England’s clash with Greece has been overshadowed by the latest legal wrangling between Stones’s employers and the Premier League

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer in ‘incredible’ place - but England boss Lee Carlsey wants him to get even better
arts.sum: The Chelsea forward has been in fine form in front of goal but doesn’t have a certain spot in the Three Lions team

arts.ttl: ‘A lot of similarities’: John Stones talks up Lee Carsley’s Guardiola-like style
arts.sum: Manchester City player to captain England versus Greece Regular skipper Harry Kane will not start due to injury John Stones believes that Lee Carsley’s style of play is making England begin to resemble a Pep Guardiola team. Carsley, who is thinking of ways to get Jude Bellingham, Phil Foden and Cole Palmer into the same starting 11, has not been afraid to make changes to tactics and personnel since taking over from Gareth Southgate on an interim basis. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley relives "iconic" England moment as fans make feelings clear on interim boss
arts.sum: England will take on Greece at Wembley with David Beckham's iconic goal resurfacing once more with Lee Carsley's new look Three Lions attracting a sellout crowd in the capital

arts.ttl: John Stones reflects on Man City struggles and shares Pep Guardiola insight
arts.sum: John Stones has started just one Premier League match so far this season, but the Manchester City and England defender insists he is not frustrated with his lack of minutes

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley removes England handbrake with FIVE forwards set to start Greece clash
arts.sum: Lee Carsley's England side will take on Greece on Thursday night minus a striker as the interim boss attempts to get several of his attacking midfielders into the same team

arts.ttl: George Baldock statement released as ex-Premier League star found dead aged just 31
arts.sum: The Greek Super League have released a statement following the tragic death of George Baldock, who was reportedly found dead in his swimming pool at the age of 31, with the league issuing their condolences

arts.ttl: England captain change announced as Lee Carsley delivers Harry Kane update
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley confirms that Harry Kane will not start Thursday's UEFA Nations League clash with Greece, where John Stones will captain the side.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley names new England captain for Greece clash as Harry Kane to miss out
arts.sum: Lee Carsley has turned to John Stones to captain England with Harry Kane absent and the Manchester City defender will lead out his nation against Greece at Wembley

arts.ttl: Stones to captain England with injured Kane on bench vs Greece
arts.sum: John Stones will captain England against Greece at Wembley on Thursday, with interim boss Lee Carsley revealing usual skipper Harry Kane will begin on the bench due to a "small knock".
